arts.ttl: Chelsea make contact to 2 players from same club – Blues close ties with agent are key
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund duo Karim Adeyemi and Gregor Kobel have ended up on Chelsea’s transfer target list. That’s according to Sky Deutschland, who cover the latest on Chelsea’s interest in the two players. Adeyemi has managed 10 goals and 10 assists from 16 games this season and has been on Chelsea’s list for long. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Brentford: Cole Palmer bidding to emulate Mohamed Salah Premier League feat
arts.sum: Cole Palmer will be bidding to emulate a feat last achieved by Mohamed Salah when Chelsea play host to Brentford in the Premier League on Sunday evening.

arts.sum: Chelsea are loving life in the Premier League under Enzo Maresca this season but they could be faced with a huge suspension problem over the next three games. Chelsea have two players on four bookings in the Premier League season in Nicolas Jackson and Robert Sanchez.
